Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class IndexRetrievalStrategy

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.RetrievalStrategy
org.javalabs.jpa.query.IndexRetrievalStrategy
public class IndexRetrievalStrategy extends RetrievalStrategy
Class that follows index based retrieval strategy.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Details

    • fetch

      protected <T> List<T> fetch(ResultSet resultSet, Class<T> clazz, int limit, Map<String,Object> hints) throws SQLException
      Description copied from class: RetrievalStrategy
      Apply the appropriate strategy and fetch the result from the underlying resultset.
      Specified by:
      fetch in class RetrievalStrategy
      Type Parameters:
      T -
      Parameters:
      resultSet - The DB result set that will be iterated over to extraact the field value(s) and populaate the placeholder.
      clazz - The entity class name.
      limit - Maximum number of records to be returned.
      hints - Optional query hint provided by user.
      Returns:
      List
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • fetchInternal

      private int fetchInternal(ClassDescriptor desc, Object element, ResultSet resultSet, int index) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException
